extraction.one_line_summary: MOHORIČ won solo after successful breakaway on flat stage, while CAVENDISH finished second failing to break MERCKX's stage win record before Paris.
tactical_patterns: POGAČAR acted as race patron, neutralizing KWIATKOWSKI's attack while teammates caught back after early crash showing dominance.
MOHORIČ won solo twice in same Tour from breakaways, rare for non-specialists to succeed individually on road stages.

rider_signals.CAVENDISH Mark: negative: second place finish despite favoring sprint stage suggests declining top-end speed or positioning issues
rider_signals.POGAČAR Tadej: positive: controlled peloton neutralizations after crashes reveals commanding tactical authority beyond just climbing strength
rider_signals.KWIATKOWSKI Michał: negative: opportunistic attack during crash-caused gap rejected by peloton under POGAČAR's direction
